violations.text: No person in charge certified in food safety management was present as needed at the time of inspection. No temperature logs are maintained for receiving, cold hold, or hot hold temperatures. Temperature logs must be maintained. Resources provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. An employee is currently taking an approved course in food safety management. Once successfully completed, employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The food service area has been moved to the second floor and is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand sanitizer is available. Hand-washing sink must be located in all food service areas. Food service area must be moved to an area containing a hand-washing sink or a hand-washing sink must be installed. Establishment is to notify inspector when food service area is relocated or when a hand-washing sink has been installed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Serving utensils are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Temperature logs are not being maintained for cold holding, receiving, or hot holding foods. An employee certified in food safety management must be available at all times when TCS foods are being prepared, handled, and served to take temperatures and maintain temperature logs. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There was no employee certified in food safety management available at the time of receiving foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the refrigerator. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
